title: Encyclia buchii
taxonomy: Encyclia buchii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Encyclia, which is a group of epiphytic orchids. The species Encyclia buchii is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cymbidieae. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other orchid species. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Encyclia buchii is part of a diverse and widespread group of flowering plants.
